messages.title: EVE AT Draft
messages.importPlaceholder: Paste an EVE-AT-DRAFT v1 payload here.

validation.ship-not-found: This ship is not available in the selected tournament dataset.
validation.max-points-reached: Adding this ship would exceed the 200 point cap.
validation.max-ships-reached: You cannot add more ships because the 10 ship cap is already reached.
validation.flagship-already-picked: Only one flagship can be picked.
validation.ship-banned: You cannot pick a ship that is already banned.
validation.logistics-cap-reached: You cannot add that ship because the logistics limit is already full.
validation.hull-cap-reached: You cannot add that ship because this hull cap is already full.
validation.ship-picked: You cannot ban a ship that is already picked.
validation.ship-not-picked: That ship is not currently picked.
validation.ship-not-banned: That ship is not currently banned.
validation.invalid-format-header: The draft text does not start with a valid EVE-AT-DRAFT v1 header.
validation.missing-year: The draft text is missing its tournament year.
validation.invalid-sections: The draft text must contain PICKS and BANS sections.
validation.invalid-entry: Each imported ship entry must start with "- ".
validation.import-unknown-year: This draft references a tournament year that is not available in the app yet.
validation.import-unknown-ship: This draft references a ship key that does not exist in the selected tournament dataset.
validation.clipboard-unavailable: Clipboard access is not available in this browser context.
